title: Příkaz mini doctor a /mini:doctor
goal: Add a 'mini doctor' command (and read-only /mini:doctor slash command) that prints a diagnostic checklist of the project setup — state presence and schema version, project.md/CHANGELOG.md presence, installed slash-command count vs expected, and mini version freshness from the cache — each line ok/warn/fail with a fix hint.

steps.title: Diagnostics model + checks
steps.detail: New src/commands/doctor.ts with a DoctorCheck type {label, status: ok|warn|fail, detail?, hint?} and a pure buildDiagnostics(input) covering: project state (missing->init, legacy->migrate, v2->ok), project.md present, CHANGELOG.md present, slash-command count vs expected (0->install-commands, fewer->update), version freshness (newer->upgrade, unknown->info, current->ok). Unit tests over the input matrix.

steps.title: doctor command + cli
steps.detail: Implement doctor() that gathers the facts (exists, raw state version, file presence, count of .md in COMMANDS_DIR, readPackageVersion, version cache) and prints the checklist with a summary; register 'mini doctor' in cli.ts.

steps.title: /mini:doctor slash command
steps.detail: Add a read-only 'doctor' entry to install/commands.ts (own body like status: runs 'mini doctor' and relays); bump the generated-command count (16->17) in install/update/install-commands tests.

steps.title: README and CHANGELOG
steps.detail: Document 'mini doctor' / '/mini:doctor' in README (commands table + slash list + generated file list) and add an English CHANGELOG entry.
